div1.entryFree:
Doctrine, 1) instruction: from women's eyes this d. I derive, LLL IV, 3, 302. LLL IV, 3, 302 we knew not the d. of ill-doing, nor dream'd that any did, Wint. I, 2, 70. thou canst not teach me to forget. I'll pay that d. Rom. I, 1, 244. I hourly learn a d. of obedience, Ant. V, 2, 31.
2) learning: the schools, embowelled of their d., have left off the danger to itself, All's I, 3, 247.
3) a principle of faith: a comfortable d., Tw. I, 5, 239. a worse sin than ill d. H8 I, 3, 60.
